final_status: ABORTED — pod bootstrap blocker (hexa baseline binary architecture mismatch)

attempts.name: anima-stage1-alm-r13
attempts.outcome: FAIL — runpodctl --gpu-type flag deprecated (runpodctl 1.x uses --gpuType). No kickoff command delivered to pod.

attempts.name: anima-stage1-alm-r13
attempts.outcome: FAIL — SSH succeeded · pod running H100 80GB HBM3 · hexa-lang cloned inside pod · BUT self/native/hexa_v2 is ARM64 (Mac) binary · 'Exec format error' on Linux x86_64. No Linux pre-built hexa binary in hexa-lang repo.

blocker_diagnosis.root_cause: hexa-lang repo self/native/hexa_v2 baseline binary is Mac ARM64. No install.sh / build script for quick Linux bootstrap. Linux parity (O75) was flagged ENV_BLOCKED earlier.
blocker_diagnosis.impact: All H100 pod kickoffs impossible until Linux hexa binary is available.
workarounds: A. hexa-lang maintainer builds Linux x86_64 hexa_v2 + publishes as GitHub release asset.
B. In-pod source build: clang -O2 self/native/hexa_cc.c runtime.c ... -o hexa_v2.
C. User builds Linux hexa binary (ubu1/ubu2/htz docker migration) + uploads to R2 asset.
D. Rewrite bootstrap as Python — violates raw#9.
blocker_diagnosis.recommended_path: C (R2 hexa binary asset) — integrates with existing R2 precache infrastructure.

current_blocker_for_next_launch: hexa-lang Linux x86_64 binary required before H100 pod kickoff (anima-external dependency).
